themes.name: Beacon
themes.tagline: For SaaS that handles money like it matters.
themes.description: Premium fintech feel. Forest signature, mono numerals, structured billing layouts. Built for receipts, invoices, and payment lifecycle.
themes.author: letterkit

files.content:
export const previewProps = {
  recipientEmail: 'alex@company.com',
  userName: 'Alex',
  invoiceNumber: 'INV-2026-0042',
  invoiceUrl: 'https://acme.com/billing/invoices/INV-2026-0042',
  planTagline: 'Your plan is active for another month.',
  lineItems: [
    { description: 'Pro Plan', amount: 29 },
    { description: 'Extra seats × 2', amount: 10 },
  ],
  subtotal: 39,
  taxAmount: 3.12,
  total: 42.12,
  paymentMethod: { brand: 'VISA', last4: '4242' },
  nextChargeAt: '2026-07-05',
  billingUrl: 'https://acme.com/billing',
  supportUrl: 'https://acme.com/support',
};

items.title: Rules that run when you are offline
items.description: Create triggers from any view. Mention @billing in a note and Beacon routes it to the right queue without another tab open.

items.title: One-click compliance bundles
items.description: Export signed activity logs as CSV or JSON. Retention windows now respect workspace policy out of the box.

items.title: Quiet hours that actually stick
items.description: Mobile push respects focus schedules across time zones. Digest emails roll up at 9am local, not server time.

previewProps.updateSummary: This month we shipped quieter notification controls, one-click compliance exports, and performance improvements across the board.
highlights: Quiet hours that respect your timezone
Audit exports in CSV or JSON
40% faster page loads on large workspaces

sharedComponents.content:
import type { EmailBrandProps } from './_components/email-brand';

/**
 * Brand / layout shell — configure once per project.
 * Design colors: themes/foundry/tokens.config.ts
 * Logo URL is injected at preview/send time (see apps/www/lib/themes.ts).
 */
export const foundryBrand: EmailBrandProps = {
  appName: 'letterkit',
  websiteUrl: 'acme.com',
  unsubscribeUrl: 'https://app.acme.com/preferences',
  termsUrl: 'https://acme.com/terms',
  privacyUrl: 'https://acme.com/privacy',
  legalName: 'Acme Inc',
  companyAddress: '350 Mission St, San Francisco',
  supportUrl: 'https://app.acme.com/support',
  copyrightYear: 2026,
};

previewProps.headline: Smart tasks, faster exports, and a calmer inbox.
previewProps.intro: This issue covers what shipped in May — workflow automation, audit tooling, and notification controls built for teams that ship weekly.

items.title: Rules that run when you are offline
items.description: Create triggers from any view. Mention @billing in a note and Foundry routes it to the right queue without another tab open.

items.title: One-click compliance bundles
items.description: Export signed activity logs as CSV or JSON. Retention windows now respect workspace policy out of the box.

items.title: Quiet hours that actually stick
items.description: Mobile push respects focus schedules across time zones. Digest emails roll up at 9am local, not server time.

themes.name: Grundy
themes.description: A minimal serif-meets-mono theme with cream backgrounds, ink typography, and terracotta accents. Typography-driven, no illustrations.
themes.author: letterkit

fontFamily.heading: "Fraunces", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif
fontFamily.body: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif
fontFamily.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace

tokens.fontFamily: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif

sharedComponents.content:
import type { EmailBrandProps } from './_components/email-brand';

/**
 * Brand / layout shell — configure once per project.
 * Design colors: themes/grundy/tokens.config.ts
 * Logo URL is injected at preview/send time (see apps/www/lib/themes.ts).
 */
export const grundyBrand: EmailBrandProps = {
  appName: 'letterkit',
  websiteUrl: 'acme.com',
  unsubscribeUrl: 'https://app.acme.com/preferences',
  termsUrl: 'https://acme.com/terms',
  privacyUrl: 'https://acme.com/privacy',
  legalName: 'Acme Inc',
  companyAddress: '350 Mission St, San Francisco, CA',
  supportUrl: 'hello@acme.com',
  copyrightYear: 2026,
};

40% faster page loads on large workspaces

themes.name: Sensei
themes.tagline: 137 SaaS email templates. One design system.
themes.description: Complete SaaS email suite — auth, billing, onboarding, notifications, team, integrations, and more. White canvas, blue accents, mock-ready previews.
themes.author: letterkit

sharedComponents.content:
import type { EmailBrandProps } from './_components/email-brand';

/**
 * Brand / layout shell — configure once per project.
 * Design colors: themes/sensei/tokens.config.ts
 * Logo URL is injected at preview/send time (see apps/www/lib/themes.ts).
 */
export const senseiBrand: EmailBrandProps = {
  appName: 'letterkit',
  websiteUrl: 'acme.com',
  unsubscribeUrl: 'https://app.acme.com/preferences',
  termsUrl: 'https://acme.com/terms',
  privacyUrl: 'https://acme.com/privacy',
  legalName: 'Acme Inc',
  companyAddress: '350 Mission St, San Francisco, CA',
  supportUrl: 'https://app.acme.com/support',
  copyrightYear: 2026,
};
